---
title: 'It''s time to stop spending my energy in someone else''s garden. It''s time to invest in my own.'
date: '2020-06-07T18:23:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'Selah'
---

The Government is on HIS shoulders...&nbsp;<div><br></div><div>I have decided that I am no longer interested in discussing government in public.&nbsp;<br></div><div><br></div><div>It's not my arena.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>It's not what I'm called to.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>It's a distraction for me from my actual calling.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>I've never once, in nearly 40-years of living, ever changed anyone's mind about politics or government. Clifton Strengthsfinder 2.0 points out that one can be passionate about something they are bad at and waste their life's energy doing something unfruitful. Meanwhile, they could put a fraction of that energy into something they were gifted to do and recieve exponentially more positive results.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>God's called me and gifted me to do many things, politics is not one of them. I have seen God promote men I do not understand, several times. I've seen God's hand on men I don't like. I've seen it be CLEARLY God when I was dumfounded. So I am laying that down. I'll leave the government to God and the people he has called to that mountain. I may observe and comment in the form of writing Fiction, and see what those trends are like extrapolated, but, I will no longer occupy my time arguing with people on this subject.</div><div><br></div><div>My calling is to Writing, Music, Prophetic Teaching, and Healing of Hearts. My calling is to discuss Fatherhood, Manhood, Marriage, Intimacy and Sex. Those are my wheelhouse. Those are things I can make a marked difference talking about. Those are the areas in which I can be a gift to the world. So that's what I'll be doing with my time.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Selah....<div><br></div><div><div><i>For a child will be born to us, a son will be given to us; And the government will rest on His shoulders; And His name will be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God, Eternal Father, Prince of Peace.</i></div><div><a href="https://bible.com/bible/100/isa.9.6.NASB"><i>Isaiah 9:6 NASB</i></a></div><div><br></div><div><i>Note: *I am sure to struggle with this. I'm sure I'll post things I later retract or delete. But I'm declaring my intention.*</i><br></div></div><div><br></div></div><div><br></div><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1591554196198405-0-26c361de01b6.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1591554196198405-0-26c361de01b6.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><br></div>
